data.title: Commerzbank Announces No Stabilization for Amprion AG’s Green Notes
data.description:
An update from Commerzbank ( (DE:CBK) ) is now available.

Commerzbank has announced that no stabilization activities were undertaken in relation to Amprion AG’s issuance of EUR 600 million 2.75% Senior Unsecured Green Notes due in 2029 and EUR 900 million 4.00% Senior Unsecured Green Notes due in 2040. These notes were launched under Amprion AG’s Debt Issuance Programme, with Commerzbank, along with several other banks, acting as stabilizing managers. The announcement indicates that the issuance was conducted without market intervention, potentially reflecting strong market confidence in Amprion AG’s green financing initiatives.

More about Commerzbank

data.title: Terra Metals Limited Releases Corporate Governance Statement for FY 2025
data.description:
GCX Metals Limited ( (AU:TM1) ) just unveiled an update.

Terra Metals Limited has released its corporate governance statement for the financial year ending June 30, 2025, which is available on its website. The statement confirms the company’s adherence to the ASX Corporate Governance Council’s recommendations, with disclosures about board responsibilities, director appointments, and accountability of the company secretary. This release highlights Terra Metals’ commitment to transparency and regulatory compliance, which is crucial for maintaining investor confidence and operational integrity.

Terra Metals Limited operates in the metals industry, focusing on the extraction and processing of various metals. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) and adheres to corporate governance standards set by the ASX Corporate Governance Council.

data.title: Hankyu Hanshin REIT Secures Interest Rate Stability Through Swap Agreement
data.description:
Hankyu Hanshin REIT, Inc. ( (JP:8977) ) has issued an announcement.

Hankyu Hanshin REIT, Inc. has completed an interest rate swap agreement to stabilize the interest rate on a borrowing of 3,400 million yen, effectively fixing it at 1.985%. This strategic financial move is expected to provide more predictable financial outcomes and potentially enhance the company’s financial stability, benefiting stakeholders by mitigating interest rate risks.

More about Hankyu Hanshin REIT, Inc.

Hankyu Hanshin REIT, Inc. operates in the real estate investment trust (REIT) industry, focusing on managing and investing in a diversified portfolio of real estate assets. The company is involved in asset management through its subsidiary, Hankyu Hanshin REIT Asset Management, Inc., and primarily targets properties in Japan.

Average Trading Volume: 1,440

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen118.8B

data.title: ESPE Secures 1 Million Euro Contract for Innovative Energy Storage Project
data.description:
An announcement from ESPE SpA ( (IT:ESPE) ) is now available.

ESPE S.p.A. has secured a 1 million Euro contract to implement a European pilot project featuring innovative flow battery energy storage systems in Emilia-Romagna. This project, part of a national strategic initiative, aims to redevelop a former industrial area into a renewable energy hub, enhancing ESPE’s industry positioning and offering long-term sustainable value.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ESPE) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.15 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ESPE SpA stock, see the IT:ESPE Stock Forecast page.

More about ESPE SpA

ESPE S.p.A., based in Grantorto, has been active in the renewable energy sector since 1974, specializing in photovoltaic systems, mini wind power, and biomass cogeneration. The company is recognized for its innovative solutions and has expanded its expertise through strategic acquisitions, positioning itself as a key player in the renewable energy industry.

data.title: MC Mining Appoints Christine He as CEO to Lead Strategic Transition
data.description:
MC Mining Ltd ( (AU:MCM) ) has shared an update.

MC Mining Limited has appointed Ms. Yi (Christine) He as the Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer, effective from October 1, 2025. Ms. He has been instrumental in transitioning the company towards sustainability and enhancing its operations, particularly with the Makhado Project. Her leadership is expected to drive the company towards achieving its coal production targets and strengthen its market position.

More about MC Mining Ltd

MC Mining Limited is an ASX/JSE-listed company focused on coal exploration, development, and mining in South Africa. Its key projects include the Uitkomst Colliery, Makhado Project, Vele Colliery, and the Greater Soutpansberg Projects, which produce various types of coal such as metallurgical, thermal, hard coking, and semi-soft coking coal.

This event provides an opportunity for investors, analysts, media, and stakeholders to engage with the company’s management and gain insights into its financial performance and strategic direction.

data.title: GARO AB CEO Jonas Klarén to Step Down in January 2026
data.description:
GARO AB ( (SE:GARO) ) just unveiled an update.

GARO AB announced that its President and CEO, Jonas Klarén, will leave his position at the end of January 2026 to become CEO of Assemblin El. Klarén has been instrumental in driving a market-oriented approach to support growth and profitability at GARO. The company will start recruiting a new CEO immediately, aiming to appoint a successor by the first quarter of 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:GARO) stock is a Hold with a SEK19.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GARO AB stock, see the SE:GARO Stock Forecast page.

More about GARO AB

GARO AB is a company that specializes in developing, manufacturing, and marketing innovative products and systems for the electrical installation market under its own brand. The company offers complete solutions in installation, e-mobility, projects, and temporary electricity, focusing on electrical safety, user-friendliness, and sustainability. Founded in 1939 and headquartered in Gnosjö, GARO operates internationally and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm.

data.title: Oracle Japan’s Q1 2026 Financial Results Show Mixed Performance
data.description:
Oracle Japan ( (JP:4716) ) has issued an announcement.

Oracle Corporation Japan reported its financial results for the first quarter ending May 31, 2026, showing a slight increase in net sales by 3.7% compared to the previous year, reaching 66,275 million yen. However, the company experienced a decline in operating profit, ordinary profit, and profit for the period, each decreasing by approximately 3.7% from the prior year. The financial position also saw a reduction in total assets and net assets. Despite these declines, the company maintains a stable shareholders’ equity ratio. The forecast for the fiscal year ending May 2026 anticipates a net sales increase between 6.0% to 10.0%, with basic earnings per share projected to range from 490.00 to 505.00 yen.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4716) stock is a Hold with a Yen16000.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oracle Japan stock, see the JP:4716 Stock Forecast page.

More about Oracle Japan

Oracle Corporation Japan operates in the technology industry, primarily focusing on providing software and cloud solutions. The company is a subsidiary of Oracle Corporation and is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. It offers a range of products and services, including database management systems, enterprise software, and cloud infrastructure solutions, targeting both corporate and institutional clients.

Average Trading Volume: 167,455

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen2090.8B
